card.reading: こくさいこうりゅうききん
card.furigana_html: <ruby>国際交流基金<rt>こくさいこうりゅうききん</rt></ruby>
card.meaning: international cultural exchange foundation; organization supporting language and cultural programs
card.sentence: 国際交流基金の日本語講座に申し込んだので、来月から毎週オンラインで授業を受ける予定です。
card.sentence_translation: Because I enrolled in the Japan Foundation's Japanese course, I plan to take online lessons every week starting next month.
